cssParts.description: The wrapper around the priority menu
cssParts.name: priority-menu

cssParts.description: The navigation item for the priority menu
cssParts.name: priority-menu-nav-item

cssParts.description: The label for the priority menu
cssParts.name: priority-menu-label

cssParts.description: The icon for the priority menu
cssParts.name: priority-menu-icon

cssParts.description: The container for the shifted navigation items, if there is not enough space.
cssParts.name: priority-menu-container

slots.description: The given navigation items. Must be horizontal `<syn-nav-item>`s or have a role of "menuitem"

summary:
The `<syn-prio-nav />` element provides a generic navigation bar
that can be used to group multiple navigation items  (usually horizontal `<syn-nav-item />`s)
together. It will automatically group all items not visible in the viewport into a custom
priority menu.
